hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ "$FILE" != "null" ]; then cd /home/user/Osaka-shop-manual && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "Auto-commit: edit ${FILE##*/}" && git push -u origin claude/auto-merge-commits-rqQDG; fi 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: 変更を自動コミット&プッシュ中...
